gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用声音编织的跨时空浪漫，笑中带泪的治愈惊喜。
gems.whyWatchEn: A cross-distance romance woven through voice messages, blending humor and heartbreak in a surprisingly touching way.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式巧合浪漫、对声音叙事敏感的文艺爱情片观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of serendipitous romance like 'Love Actually' and viewers who appreciate voice-driven, intimate storytelling.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 数字时代下玩具的生存寓言，怀旧与创新碰撞的合家欢。
gems.whyWatchEn: A clever allegory for toys in the digital age, balancing nostalgia with fresh, tech-savvy characters for all ages.
gems.audience: 皮克斯老粉、带娃家长，以及思考屏幕时代童年变化的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Pixar loyalists, parents with kids, and anyone reflecting on how screens reshape childhood.
